summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Public Assets Upgrade (Phase B): search suggestions with validation, comprehensive sorting (yield/price/progress/newest), pagination (6 default + 6 more), Capital Stack with real crypto/fiat split from confirmed pool contributions, and interactive Leaflet+OSM map with route button. All 15 demo assets seeded correctly, backend APIs returning proper data structure, frontend UI fully functional with all interactive elements working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/assets?limit=60 returns 15 total assets
Backend: 12 assets with status 'open' (expected ~12)
Backend: GET /api/assets/asset-podilskyi/capital-stack returns crypto_raised=$900,000 and fiat_raised=$1,350,000
Backend: Capital stack has NO 'debt' layer (correct)
Backend: Capital stack has 'investors_crypto' and 'investors_fiat' layers
Backend: GET /api/assets/asset-kharkiv-bc/intelligence returns capital_stack with crypto/fiat split
Backend: All assets have required sorting fields (target_yield, min_ticket, created_at, featured)
Backend: Assets have progress calculation fields
Frontend /assets: Page loads with lazy loading (Suspense fallback 'Завантаження…')
Frontend /assets: Search input [data-testid=assets-search-input] present
Frontend /assets: Typing 1 char shows hint [data-testid=assets-search-hint] 'Введіть щонайменше 2 символи для пошуку'
Frontend /assets: Typing >=2 chars shows suggestions dropdown [data-testid=assets-search-suggestions]
Frontend /assets: 4 suggestions found for 'Київ'
Frontend /assets: Clicking suggestion [data-testid=assets-suggestion-0] fills input
Frontend /assets: Clear button [data-testid=assets-search-clear] resets input
Frontend /assets: Sort dropdown [data-testid=assets-sort-select] present and functional
Frontend /assets: Changing sort to 'yield_desc' re-orders cards in [data-testid=assets-grid]
Frontend /assets: Default pagination shows exactly 6 cards
Frontend /assets: 'Показати більше' button [data-testid=assets-show-more] present
Frontend /assets: Clicking 'Show more' loads +6 more cards (total 12)
Frontend /assets: Shown count [data-testid=assets-shown-count] updates correctly ('Показано 6 з 15' → 'Показано 12 з 15')
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Page loads with lazy loading
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Capital Stack [data-testid=capital-stack] section found
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Crypto tile [data-testid=capital-crypto] shows $21,951
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Fiat tile [data-testid=capital-fiat] shows $32,927
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Capital stack waterfall bar [data-testid=capital-stack-bar] rendered
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: 4 capital stack layers found (investors_crypto, investors_fiat, reserve, platform)
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: NO debt layer present (correct)
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Map container [data-testid=asset-map] found
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Leaflet map initialized (.leaflet-container)
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Map marker pane (.leaflet-marker-pane) found
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: 'Прокласти маршрут' button [data-testid=asset-map-route] found and clickable
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: 'Відкрити в Google Maps' link [data-testid=asset-map-open] found with correct URL
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Asset snapshot [data-testid=asset-snapshot] found
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Conviction score card [data-testid=conviction-card] found
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Liquidity score card [data-testid=liquidity-card] found
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Investment thesis [data-testid=investment-thesis] found
Frontend /objects/asset-podilskyi: Scenario engine [data-testid=scenario-engine] found

success_percentage.integration: 100% (backend APIs correctly integrated with frontend components)
